messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a residential real estate luxury listings deck for clients. Output as 'Luxury_Estate_Listings.pptx', write in English, and configure 4:3 Standard landscape slides. The aesthetic should be warm beige and wood tones with elegant serif fonts. You are not allowed to fetch data or images via external APIs; rely solely on hardcoded values within your codebase. When adding charts, you must utilize XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. It is also mandatory to check if slide.shapes.title is not None before assigning to its .text field.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Luxury_Estate_Listings.pptx"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

PALETTE = {
    "cream": "#FDF8F2",
    "gold": "#C4A882",
    "dark_wood": "#8B6914",
    "espresso": "#3E2723",
    "taupe": "#D4C5A9",
    "warm_white": "#FAF5EF",
}

FONT_STACK = ["Georgia", "Palatino Linotype", "Times New Roman"]


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str: str) -> RGBColor:
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex: str):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(
    slide, left, top, width, height, text,
    font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, bold=False,
    color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, italic=False,
):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = font_name
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.italic = italic
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color="#FAF5EF", border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(text, slide, left, top, font_size=12, color_hex="#C4A882"):
    txBox = add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(6), Pt(font_size + 4), text,
                          font_name="Georgia", font_size=font_size, bold=True,
                          color_hex=color_hex)
    return txBox


def add_footer(prs, slide, text="© 2024 Prestige Estates"):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(7.15), Inches(8.8), Pt(9), text,
                 font_name="Georgia", font_size=9, color_hex="#D4C5A9",
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D4C5A9")
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#C4A882")
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.6),
                     "Property Photo", font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, color_hex="#8B6914",
                     alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_gold_line(slide, left, top, width):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Pt(2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#C4A882")
    shape.line.fill.background()


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "LUXURY ESTATE", font_name="Georgia", font_size=40, bold=True,
                 color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "LISTINGS", font_name="Georgia", font_size=40, bold=True,
                 color_hex="#8B6914", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(3.25), Inches(3.7), Inches(3.5))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Exclusive Properties for Discerning Clients", font_name="Palatino Linotype",
                 font_size=18, color_hex="#C4A882", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(6.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Spring 2024 Collection", font_name="Georgia", font_size=13, color_hex="#8B6914",
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, slide, "© 2024 Prestige Estates")


def slide_02_featured_properties(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_section_label("CURATED COLLECTION", slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Featured Properties"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.6),
                     "Featured Properties", font_name="Georgia", font_size=30, bold=True,
                     color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(1.55), Inches(2.0))

    # Three property cards in a row
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(3.6)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2
    card_y = Inches(1.9)

    properties = [
        ("The Oakwood Manor", "$4,850,000", "6 Beds · 5 Baths · 7,200 sqft"),
        ("Riverside Villa Estate", "$3,200,000", "5 Beds · 4 Baths · 5,800 sqft"),
        ("Crestview Heights", "$5,500,000", "7 Beds · 6 Baths · 9,100 sqft"),
    ]

    for i, (name, price, specs) in enumerate(properties):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, card_y, card_w, card_h, PALETTE["warm_white"], "#C4A882")

        # Image placeholder area inside card
        add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "", x + Inches(0.15), card_y + Inches(0.15),
                                 card_w - Inches(0.3), Inches(1.6))

        # Property name
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), card_y + Inches(1.9), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4),
                     name, font_name="Georgia", font_size=13, bold=True, color_hex="#3E2723")

        # Price
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), card_y + Inches(2.35), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     price, font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#8B6914")

        # Specs
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), card_y + Inches(2.75), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     specs, font_name="Georgia", font_size=10, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_footer(prs, slide)


def slide_03_spotlight(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_section_label("FEATURED LISTING", slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "The Oakwood Manor"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.6),
                     "The Oakwood Manor", font_name="Georgia", font_size=30, bold=True,
                     color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(1.55), Inches(2.0))

    # Left: large image placeholder
    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "", Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.0), Inches(4.5))

    # Right: property details
    detail_left = Inches(3.9)
    detail_top = Inches(1.8)
    detail_width = Inches(5.5)

    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top, detail_width, Inches(0.4),
                 "Price", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex="#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(0.35), detail_width, Inches(0.5),
                 "$4,850,000", font_name="Georgia", font_size=26, bold=True, color_hex="#3E2723")

    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(1.0), detail_width, Inches(0.3),
                 "Address", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex="#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(1.35), detail_width, Inches(0.3),
                 "142 Oakwood Drive, Beverly Hills, CA 90210", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(1.85), detail_width, Inches(0.3),
                 "Specifications", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex="#C4A882")
    specs = "6 Bedrooms · 5 Full Baths · 7,200 Sq Ft\nBuilt-in Gourmet Kitchen · Private Pool & Spa\nWine Cellar · Home Theater · 3-Car Garage"
    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(2.15), detail_width, Inches(1.4),
                 specs, font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(6.3), Inches(8.8))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(6.5), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "A masterpiece of modern luxury nestled among century-old oak trees", font_name="Palatino Linotype",
                 font_size=13, color_hex="#C4A882", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, slide)


def slide_04_contact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_section_label("GET IN TOUCH", slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Schedule a Private Viewing"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.6),
                     "Schedule a Private Viewing", font_name="Georgia", font_size=30, bold=True,
                     color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(1.55), Inches(3.0))

    # Two contact cards side by side
    card_w = Inches(4.0)
    card_h = Inches(3.2)
    gap = Inches(0.8)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_w - gap) / 2
    card_y = Inches(1.9)

    # Left card: Agent details
    agent_card = add_card(slide, start_x, card_y, card_w, card_h, PALETTE["warm_white"], "#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                 "Your Luxury Agent", font_name="Georgia", font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.75), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.35),
                 "Alexandra Whitmore", font_name="Georgia", font_size=20, bold=True, color_hex="#3E2723")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.2), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Senior Estate Advisor", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#C4A882")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.75), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Phone: (310) 555-0192", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.1), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Email: a.whitmore@prestigeestates.com", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.45), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "License #DRE 01987654", font_name="Georgia", font_size=11, color_hex="#C4A882")

    # Right card: Office details
    office_card = add_card(slide, start_x + card_w + gap, card_y, card_w, card_h, PALETTE["warm_white"], "#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                 "Prestige Estates", font_name="Georgia", font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.75), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Luxury Real Estate Group", font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, color_hex="#3E2723")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.2), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "8500 Wilshire Blvd, Suite 400", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.5), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Beverly Hills, CA 90211", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.0), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Office: (310) 555-0100", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.35), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "www.prestigeestates.com", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.5), Inches(8.8))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.7), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Private viewings available by appointment only", font_name="Palatino Linotype",
                 font_size=13, color_hex="#C4A882", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, slide)


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_featured_properties(prs)
    slide_03_spotlight(prs)
    slide_04_contact(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
